name: store_report_artifact
description: Store a report artifact. If project_id is provided, also persists it as a queryable BusinessData Report item (docs/REPORT-EXPORT-SPEC.md) so it shows up in the project's Xuất báo cáo tab, not just as a raw S3 blob.

project_id.description: Optional. When set, the report is also stored as a BusinessData Report item scoped to this project.

category.description: daily | weekly | manual. Defaults to manual.
